upstream_note: v1 fixes the upstream to the OpenAI shape on /v1/messages; every non-openai cell is a translation claim. The full 6x6 (all upstream dialects) is future work.

openai.verdict_note: HTTP 200 on POST /v1/messages: bad no choices[0].message

openai-responses.verdict_note: HTTP 404 on POST /v1/responses: bad not JSON

anthropic.verdict_note: UNTRANSLATED passthrough mock canned /messages body (id msg_x) — the gateway proxied /v1/messages through verbatim instead of translating (HTTP 200)

gemini.verdict_note: HTTP 404 on POST /v1beta/models/azure_ai/mock:generateContent: bad not JSON

cohere.verdict_note: HTTP 404/405 on /v2/chat, then HTTP 404 on fallback /v1/chat: bad not JSON

bedrock.verdict_note: HTTP 404 on POST /model/azure_ai/mock/converse: bad not JSON

hardware: AWS m7g.2xlarge (Graviton3, 8 cores / 32 GB). Gateway pinned to 4 cores, mock+loadgen on the other 4, Ubuntu 24.04. One dedicated box per gateway.
